creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194097
Proposed patch

Hi again Chris,

After some discussion, it seems it is better to move the icons distribution elsewhere. I placed them in my account.

Just FYI, other ports (print/jabref, misc/mc, editors/openoffice-devel) should get rid of its binary files in files/ at some point so this is not an issue for this specific port.

Cheers
